'''Nodobo''' was a male [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Swoop racing/Legends|swoop racer]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. When [[Meetra Surik]] met him in the year [[3951 BBY]] he had spent all of his credits on upgrading his [[Swoop/Legends|swoop bike]] in order to become the champion of the circuit; the prize money was a large enough sum to allow him to leave Nar Shaddaa. His plan was thwarted by [[Lupo Shar]], the owner of the racing circuit, who had commissioned the construction of a [[Droid/Legends|droid]], [[C9-T9-GE3|C9-T9]], to be an unbeatable swoop riding champion.

{{Char-stub}}
